name: otp
label: OTP Input
description: A segmented one-time-code input with auto-advance, backspace and arrow-key navigation, and paste-to-fill. Works with wire:model or a plain form field, and can fire an event when complete.

props.name: name
props.description: Name for a hidden input, for plain form submission.

props.name: value
props.description: Initial code to pre-fill the boxes.

props.name: autofocus
props.description: Focus the first box on load.

props.name: eventCallback
props.description: Window event name dispatched (with { detail: { code } }) once every box is filled.
